title: Find opportunities to become a supplier with the Ministry of Defence

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Leaflet explaining how suppliers can work with the Ministry of Defence (MOD).

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Helping suppliers new to Defence understand the different ways of working with us, from joining supplier forums to bidding for contracts.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Promotional material: Find opportunities to become a supplier with the Ministry of Defence
